现在我对整个设计有了完整的了解。以下是同一会话中用户连续对话样式修改的完整设计：

---

## 同一会话连续样式修改的设计

### 整体架构：双层状态维护

连续对话样式修改采用**两层状态**同步维护：

| 层次 | 位置 | 数据结构 | 作用 |
|------|------|----------|------|
| 运行时层 | `content.js` 内存 | `cssStack[]` 数组 | 页面实时渲染 |
| 持久化层 | `chrome.storage.local` | `sessions:{domain}:{id}:styles` 字符串 | 刷新恢复 |

---

### 1. 运行时层：`cssStack` 变更栈（content.js）

`cssStack` 是一个数组，**每次 `apply_styles(save)` 都将新 CSS 作为独立条目压入栈**：

```911:1033:extension/content/content.js
const cssStack = [];
// ...
function injectCSS(css) {
  cssStack.push(css);   // 新 CSS 压栈，不覆盖旧的
  // ...
  applyCurrentCSS();    // 把栈内所有 CSS 拼接后渲染
}

function rollbackCSS(scope = 'last') {
  if (scope === 'all') {
    cssStack.length = 0;  // 清空全栈
  } else {
    cssStack.pop();       // 弹出最后一次
  }
  applyCurrentCSS();
}

function applyCurrentCSS() {
  const fullCSS = cssStack.join('\n');  // 栈内所有 CSS 拼接
  // 注入到页面
}
```

**关键点**：`cssStack` 保留了每次修改的"独立快照"，`rollback_last` 只需 `pop()` 即可精确撤回上一步。

---

### 2. 持久化层：`mergeCSS` 去重合并（sidepanel/css-merge.js）

存储层使用**属性级去重合并**策略，避免 CSS 无限膨胀：

```319:353:extension/sidepanel/css-merge.js
function mergeCSS(existingCSS, newCSS) {
  const existingRules = parseRules(existingCSS);
  const newRules = parseRules(newCSS);

  for (const [selector, props] of newRules) {
    if (!existingRules.has(selector)) {
      existingRules.set(selector, props);        // 新选择器：直接添加
    } else {
      for (const [prop, val] of props) {
        existing.set(prop, val);                  // 同选择器同属性：新值覆盖旧值
      }
    }
  }
  return serializeRules(existingRules);
}
```

合并规则：
- **同选择器同属性** → 新值覆盖旧值（防止冲突）
- **同选择器不同属性** → 追加合并
- **不同选择器** → 直接并列保留
- **`@media` / `@keyframes` 等 at-rule** → 整体按 header 替换

---

### 3. `apply_styles(save)` 的完整流程

每次用户对话触发样式修改时：

```480:503:extension/sidepanel/tools.js
// save 模式
// 1. 注入 CSS 到页面（cssStack.push + 渲染）
const injectResp = await sendToContentScript({ tool: 'inject_css', args: { css } });

// 2. 读取已有 CSS，与新 CSS 合并去重，写回存储
const { [sKey]: existing = '' } = await chrome.storage.local.get(sKey);
const merged = mergeCSS(existing, css);
await chrome.storage.local.set({ [sKey]: merged });

// 3. 同步到 active_styles（供页面刷新时无闪烁恢复）
await syncActiveStyles();

// 4. 更新样式摘要（注入 Agent 下轮 System Prompt）
await updateStylesSummary();
```

---

### 4. 撤回机制的设计差异

| 操作 | `cssStack`（运行时） | `chrome.storage`（持久化） |
|------|---------------------|--------------------------|
| `rollback_last` | `pop()` 弹出最后一项 | 读取剩余 `cssStack.join('\n')` → `mergeCSS('', remaining)` 归一化后写回 |
| `rollback_all` | `length = 0` 清空 | 直接删除 `stylesKey` |

**注意**：这里有一个设计上的**不对称性**——运行时 `cssStack` 保留了逐步快照（可精确 `pop`），但持久化层在 `rollback_last` 后只能重新从当前剩余 CSS 归一化写入，**无法从存储层单独恢复"倒数第二次"的快照**。所以撤回依赖的是运行时栈，刷新后只有最终合并态。

---

### 5. 跨轮的上下文感知

Agent 每轮 System Prompt 中都注入 `activeStylesSummary`（由 `updateStylesSummary` 生成），包含当前已应用的规则数量和前 3 个选择器，让模型在下一轮对话时感知"已改了什么"，避免重复或冲突修改。

_**User**_

我想实现让用户在界面上点击历史输入无论什么时候都可以回到任何一轮对话相应的样式也是一样，因此目前的同一会话连续样式修改的设计需要修改已达到此目标，可以是存储样式diff也可以是其他更好的方法。另外若用户回到历史某轮对话上下文应该也要进行对应的调整。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to implement a feature where clicking on any historical message in the chat UI will restore the styles to that point in the conversation. This requires:

1. Being able to jump to any point in the conversation history and restore the corresponding CSS state
2. Adjusting the conversation context when jumping back

Let me think about this carefully. Currently:
- `cssStack[]` is a runtime array that accumulates CSS per `apply_styles(save)` call
- `mergeCSS` merges all CSS into a single string in storage
- There's no per-turn snapshot, so you can't jump back to turn N's style state

The user is asking me to design a solution. This is a significant architectural change. 

I need to map out the different approaches here since this touches multiple files and involves real trade-offs between storage overhead and computational complexity.</details></think>

card.classList.remove('collapsed');\\\\\\\\n      card.classList.add('expanded');\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      card.classList.remove('expanded');\\\\\\\\n Chinese.\\\",\\\"signature\\\":\\\"\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":30}\",\"814ad20b-0cd7-4e59-be60-d0e6ed100c03\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"9c0c4c14-c3cd-4538-8f0b-b469f5583507\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-10T14:03:51.000Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"好的，以下是对三个文件的详尽分析：\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. &#96;panel.js&#96; — 消息渲染与 UI 交互\\\\n\\\\n### 消息数据结构\\\\n\\\\n消息遵循 **Anthropic Messages API** 格式，在 &#96;history&#96; 数组中存储：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\\\\n// 用户消息\\\\n{ role: 'user', content: '把背景改成深蓝色' }\\\\n\\\\n// 助手消息（content 是数组）\\\\n{ role: 'assistant', content: [\\\\n    { type: 'text', text: '好的，我来修改...' },\\\\n    { type: 'tool_use', id: 'call_xxx', name: 'apply_styles', input: {...} }\\\\n]}\\\\n\\\\n// 工具结果消息（也挂在 role: 'user' 上）\\\\n{ role: 'user', content: [\\\\n    { type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: 'call_xxx', content: '...' }\\\\n]}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 核心消息渲染函数\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;renderUserMessage(content)&#96;** (L3110-3120) — 创建用户气泡：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;3110:3120:extension/sidepanel/panel.js\\\\nfunction renderUserMessage(content) {\\\\n  const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');\\\\n  messageDiv.className = 'message message-user';\\\\n  \\\\n  const bubbleDiv = document.createElement('div');\\\\n  bubbleDiv.className = 'message-bubble';\\\\n  bubbleDiv.textContent = content;\\\\n  \\\\n  messageDiv.appendChild(bubbleDiv);\\\\n  return messageDiv;\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;renderAssistantMessageContainer()&#96;** (L3126-3135) — 创建助手消息容器（流式输出目标）：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;3126:3135:extension/sidepanel/panel.js\\\\nfunction renderAssistantMessageContainer() {\\\\n  const messageDiv = document.createElement('div');\\\\n  messageDiv.className = 'message message-assistant';\\\\n  \\\\n  const bubbleDiv = document.createElement('div');\\\\n  bubbleDiv.className = 'message-bubble streaming-text';\\\\n  \\\\n  messageDiv.appendChild(bubbleDiv);\\\\n  return messageDiv;\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 流式文本渲染器 &#96;StreamingTextRenderer&#96; (L3145-3317)\\\\n\\\\n这是处理 LLM 流式输出的核心类：\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;appendText(text)&#96;** — 追加文本到缓冲区，调用 &#96;_renderMarkdown()&#96; 实时渲染，并维护一个 &#96;.typing-cursor&#96; 光标元素\\\\n- **&#96;finish()&#96;** — 结束流式输出，移除光标，做最终渲染\\\\n- **&#96;_renderMarkdown(text)&#96;** — 基础 Markdown 渲染：代码块、行内代码、加粗、斜体、删除线、链接、段落\\\\n- **&#96;_scrollToBottom()&#96;** — 通过 &#96;requestAnimationFrame&#96; 平滑滚动\\\\n\\\\n### 历史消息渲染 &#96;renderHistoryMessages(history)&#96; (L3410-3494)\\\\n\\\\n用于会话切换时恢复对话历史：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;3410:3494:extension/sidepanel/panel.js\\\\nfunction renderHistoryMessages(history) {\\\\n  // 清空当前对话区\\\\n  clearMessages();\\\\n  \\\\n  if (!history || history.length === 0) {\\\\n    showEmptyState();\\\\n    return;\\\\n  }\\\\n  \\\\n  for (const message of history) {\\\\n    if (message.role === 'user') {\\\\n      // 从 content 中提取文本\\\\n      const userContent = typeof message.content === 'string' \\\\n        ? message.content \\\\n        : message.content?.[0]?.text || '';\\\\n      // ... 渲染用户消息\\\\n    } else if (message.role === 'assistant') {\\\\n      // 遍历 content 数组，分别处理 text 和 tool_use 块\\\\n      // text → StreamingTextRenderer 渲染\\\\n      // tool_use → ToolCardManager 渲染工具卡片（完成状态）\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n  scrollToBottom();\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n关键细节：对于历史中的 &#96;tool_use&#96; 块，工具结果显示为 &#96;'(历史记录)'&#96;，因为原始 &#96;tool_result&#96; 没有存储在 assistant 消息的 content 中。\\\\n\\\\n### 工具卡片系统 &#96;ToolCardManager&#96; (L3534-3686)\\\\n\\\\n管理工具调用的可视化卡片：\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;createCardGroup()&#96;** — 创建 &#96;.tool-card-group&#96; 容器\\\\n- **&#96;addToolCard(toolId, toolName)&#96;** — 添加\\\\\\\"进行中\\\\\\\"状态的卡片（显示 &#96;◌ 进行中&#96;）\\\\n- **&#96;completeToolCard(toolId, toolName, input, output)&#96;** — 更新为完成状态（&#96;✅&#96;），默认折叠\\\\n- **&#96;toggleCard(card)&#96;** — 点击 header 展开/折叠（手风琴模式：展开一个自动折叠其他）\\\\n\\\\n工具名称有友好映射（L3507-3519）：&#96;apply_styles&#96; → &#96;'应用样式'&#96;，&#96;grep&#96; → &#96;'搜索页面元素'&#96; 等。\\\\n\\\\n### 消息点击事件\\\\n\\\\n**消息本身没有点击事件**。点击交互只存在于：\\\\n- 工具卡片的 header（展开/折叠）：&#96;header.addEventListener('click', () =&gt; this.toggleCard(card))&#96; (L3646)\\\\n- 确认浮层的按钮（确认/撤销）\\\\n\\\\n### 发送流程 &#96;handleSendClick()&#96; (L1315-1517)\\\\n\\\\n完整的用户发送消息流程：\\\\n1. 获取输入文本，如有选中元素则拼接 &#96;[用户指定元素]&#96; 块\\\\n2. 清空输入框，移除空状态提示\\\\n3. 渲染用户消息气泡 → 创建助手消息容器 → 创建 &#96;StreamingTextRenderer&#96;\\\\n4. 调用 &#96;agentLoop(finalMessage, uiCallbacks)&#96;，传入 4 个回调：\\\\n   - &#96;appendText&#96; → &#96;streamingRenderer.appendText(delta)&#96;\\\\n   - &#96;showToolCall&#96; → &#96;createToolCard(block.id, block.name)&#96;\\\\n   - &#96;showToolExecuting&#96; → 日志记录\\\\n   - &#96;showToolResult&#96; → &#96;completeToolCard()&#96;\\\\n5. 完成后如果有 &#96;apply_styles&#96; 调用，显示确认浮层\\\\n\\\\n### 滚动机制\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;scrollToBottom()&#96;** (L3343-3353) — 使用 &#96;requestAnimationFrame&#96; + &#96;scrollTo({ behavior: 'smooth' })&#96; 平滑滚动\\\\n- **&#96;addMessageToContainer()&#96;** (L3323-3329) — 每次添加消息后自动调用 &#96;scrollToBottom()&#96;\\\\n- &#96;StreamingTextRenderer._scrollToBottom()&#96; — 流式输出时持续滚动（直接设置 &#96;scrollTop&#96;，无平滑动画）\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. &#96;session.js&#96; — 会话存储架构\\\\n\\\\n### 双层存储设计\\\\n\\\\n| 存储层 | 用途 | 数据类型 |\\\\n|---|---|---|\\\\n| **chrome.storage.local** | 轻量高频读写 | 会话索引、元数据、CSS 样式、Schema 版本 |\\\\n| **IndexedDB** (&#96;StyleSwiftDB&#96;) | 大体积低频读写 | 对话历史 (messages 数组) |\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;SessionContext&#96; 类 (L351-402)\\\\n\\\\n为每个会话生成标准化的存储 key：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;3351:402:extension/sidepanel/session.js\\\\nclass SessionContext {\\\\n  constructor(domain, sessionId) {\\\\n    this.domain = domain;\\\\n    this.sessionId = sessionId;\\\\n  }\\\\n  get stylesKey()       // → 'sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles'\\\\n  get metaKey()         // → 'sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:meta'\\\\n  get historyKey()      // → '{domain}:{sessionId}'\\\\n  get activeStylesKey() // → 'active_styles:{domain}'\\\\n  get sessionIndex()    // → 'sessions:{domain}:index'\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 完整的 Storage Key 清单\\\\n\\\\n| Key 格式 | 存储位置 | 值类型 | 说明 |\\\\n|---|---|---|---|\\\\n| &#96;_schemaVersion&#96; | chrome.storage.local | &#96;number&#96; | Schema 版本号（当前 v1） |\\\\n| &#96;sessions:{domain}:index&#96; | chrome.storage.local | &#96;Array&lt;{id, created_at}&gt;&#96; | 域名下所有会话索引 |\\\\n| &#96;sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:meta&#96; | chrome.storage.local | &#96;{title, created_at, message_count, activeStylesSummary?}&#96; | 会话元数据 |\\\\n| &#96;sessions:{domain}:{sessionId}:styles&#96; | chrome.storage.local | &#96;string&#96; (CSS) | 当前会话的 CSS |\\\\n| &#96;active_styles:{domain}&#96; | chrome.storage.local | &#96;string&#96; (CSS) | 镜像当前活跃会话 CSS，供 early-inject.js 读取 |\\\\n| &#96;{domain}:{sessionId}&#96; | IndexedDB &#96;conversations&#96; store | &#96;Array&lt;message&gt;&#96; | 对话历史 |\\\\n\\\\n### IndexedDB 操作\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;openDB()&#96;** (L77-129) — 打开/缓存数据库实例，DB_NAME=&#96;'StyleSwiftDB'&#96;，DB_VERSION=1，ObjectStore=&#96;'conversations'&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;saveHistory(domain, sessionId, history)&#96;** (L242-254) — key=&#96;{domain}:{sessionId}&#96;，&#96;store.put(history, key)&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;loadHistory(domain, sessionId)&#96;** (L271-281) — 返回 messages 数组或空数组\\\\n- **&#96;loadAndPrepareHistory(domain, sessionId)&#96;** (L302-305) — 安全包装，确保返回 &#96;Array&#96;\\\\n- **&#96;deleteHistory(domain, sessionId)&#96;** (L320-331) — 删除指定会话的历史\\\\n\\\\n### 会话管理\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;getOrCreateSession(domain)&#96;** (L458-493) — 返回最新创建的会话 ID，无会话时 &#96;crypto.randomUUID()&#96; 创建新的\\\\n- **&#96;deleteSession(domain, sessionId)&#96;** (L646-685) — 级联删除：索引条目 + meta/styles key + IndexedDB 历史\\\\n- **&#96;autoTitle(sessionMeta, firstUserMessage)&#96;** (L612-616) — 首条用户消息前 20 字作标题\\\\n\\\\n### 样式摘要 &#96;updateStylesSummary()&#96; (L849-888)\\\\n\\\\n读取当前会话 CSS，统计 &#96;{&#96; 数量得到规则数，提取前 3 个选择器，生成摘要如 &#96;\\\\\\\"5 条规则，涉及 body, .header, .nav 等\\\\\\\"&#96;，写入 &#96;meta.activeStylesSummary&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n### 清理策略\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;cleanupStorage()&#96;** (L705-772) — 每个域名最多保留 &#96;MAX_SESSIONS_PER_DOMAIN=20&#96; 个会话，超过 &#96;SESSION_EXPIRE_DAYS=90&#96; 天过期\\\\n- **&#96;cleanupStyleSkills()&#96;** (L782-809) — 最多保留 50 个风格技能\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. &#96;agent-loop.js&#96; — Agent 循环与消息管理\\\\n\\\\n### 系统提示词构建\\\\n\\\\n**Layer 0** — &#96;SYSTEM_BASE&#96; 常量 (L24-52)：~200 tokens 的固定提示词，包含身份定义、工作方式、CSS 规则、元素定位、风格技能指引。\\\\n\\\\n**Layer 1** — &#96;buildSessionContext(domain, sessionMeta, profileHint)&#96; (L137-152)：\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;137:152:extension/sidepanel/agent-loop.js\\\\nfunction buildSessionContext(domain, sessionMeta, profileHint) {\\\\n  let ctx = &#96;\\\\\\\\n[会话上下文]\\\\\\\\n域名: ${domain}\\\\\\\\n会话: ${sessionMeta.title || '新会话'}\\\\\\\\n&#96;;\\\\n  if (sessionMeta.activeStylesSummary) {\\\\n    ctx += &#96;已应用样式: ${sessionMeta.activeStylesSummary}\\\\\\\\n&#96;;\\\\n  }\\\\n  if (profileHint) {\\\\n    ctx += &#96;用户风格偏好: ${profileHint} (详情可通过 get_user_profile 获取)\\\\\\\\n&#96;;\\\\n  }\\\\n  return ctx;\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n最终 system prompt = &#96;SYSTEM_BASE + buildSessionContext(...)&#96; (L1112)\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;agentLoop(prompt, uiCallbacks)&#96; 主循环 (L1056-1229)\\\\n\\\\n**完整流程**：\\\\n\\\\n1. **并发保护** — &#96;isAgentRunning&#96; 标志，拒绝重复请求\\\\n2. **锁定 Tab** — &#96;lockTab(tabId)&#96; 锁定当前页签\\\\n3. **页面预检测** — &#96;checkPageAccess(tabId)&#96; 检测受限页面\\\\n4. **会话加载** — &#96;getOrCreateSession(domain)&#96; → &#96;SessionContext&#96; → &#96;setCurrentSession()&#96;\\\\n5. **加载历史** — &#96;loadAndPrepareHistory(domain, sessionId)&#96; 从 IndexedDB 读取\\\\n6. **构建 system prompt** — L0 + L1\\\\n7. **追加用户消息** — &#96;history.push({ role: 'user', content: prompt })&#96;\\\\n8. **迭代循环** (最多 &#96;MAX_ITERATIONS=20&#96; 轮)：\\\\n   - 调用 &#96;callLLMStreamSafe()&#96; 流式 API\\\\n   - 追加 assistant 消息到 history\\\\n   - 如果 &#96;stop_reason !== 'tool_use'&#96;，跳出\\\\n   - 否则遍历 tool_use 块，执行工具，结果追加为 &#96;{ role: 'user', content: [tool_results] }&#96;\\\\n   - Token 预算检查：&#96;lastInputTokens &gt; TOKEN_BUDGET(50000)&#96; 时触发压缩\\\\n9. **持久化** — &#96;saveHistory(domain, sessionId, history)&#96; 保存到 IndexedDB\\\\n10. **自动标题** — 首轮对话用 prompt 前 20 字\\\\n\\\\n### messages 数组的管理\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\\\\n// 1. 从 IndexedDB 加载\\\\nlet history = await loadAndPrepareHistory(domain, sessionId);  // Array\\\\n\\\\n// 2. 追加用户消息\\\\nhistory.push({ role: 'user', content: prompt });\\\\n\\\\n// 3. 追加 LLM 回复\\\\nhistory.push({ role: 'assistant', content: response.content });\\\\n\\\\n// 4. 追加工具结果\\\\nhistory.push({ role: 'user', content: [\\\\n  { type: 'tool_result', tool_use_id: 'xxx', content: '...' }\\\\n] });\\\\n\\\\n// 5. 可能压缩\\\\nhistory = await checkAndCompressHistory(history, lastInputTokens);\\\\n\\\\n// 6. 最终保存\\\\nawait saveHistory(domain, sessionId, history);\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 历史压缩机制 (L195-358)\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;checkAndCompressHistory(history, lastInputTokens)&#96;** — 超过 &#96;TOKEN_BUDGET=50000&#96; 时触发\\\\n- **&#96;findTurnBoundary(history, 10)&#96;** — 从后往前找第 10 个 user 文本消息的位置\\\\n- **&#96;summarizeOldTurns(oldHistory)&#96;** — 调用 LLM 用 OpenAI 兼容 API 生成 &lt;= 300 字摘要\\\\n- 压缩后格式：&#96;[{ role: 'user', content: '[之前的对话摘要]\\\\\\\\n...' }, ...最近10轮]&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### LLM API 调用 &#96;callLLMStream()&#96; (L490-716)\\\\n\\\\n消息格式转换：内部使用 Anthropic 格式 → 发送前转换为 OpenAI 格式：\\\\n- &#96;user&#96; 文本消息 → &#96;{ role: 'user', content }&#96;\\\\n- &#96;user&#96; &#96;tool_result&#96; → &#96;{ role: 'tool', tool_call_id, content }&#96;\\\\n- &#96;assistant&#96; → &#96;{ role: 'assistant', content, tool_calls? }&#96;\\\\n\\\\n流式响应解析 SSE，构建 &#96;{ content: [text/tool_use], stop_reason, usage }&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### 安全机制\\\\n\\\\n- **死循环检测** (L865-891) — 连续 3 次相同工具名+参数 → 强制中断\\\\n- **带重试工具执行** (L902-925) — 最多重试 &#96;MAX_RETRIES=2&#96; 次\\\\n- **API 重试** (L729-751) — 429 限流时指数退避重试（2s, 4s）\\\\n- **取消支持** — &#96;AbortController&#96; + &#96;cancelAgentLoop()&#96; 可随时中断\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;updateStylesSummary&#96; 的位置\\\\n\\\\n这个函数实际定义在 &#96;session.js&#96; (L849-888) 而非 &#96;agent-loop.js&#96;。它读取 &#96;currentSession.stylesKey&#96; 对应的 CSS，统计规则数和前 3 个选择器，写入 &#96;meta.activeStylesSummary&#96;。它被工具执行（如 &#96;apply_styles&#96;）后调用，让 system prompt 中能反映当前样式状态。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n### 三者之间的协作关系\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n用户输入 → panel.js (handleSendClick)\\\\n         → 渲染用户气泡\\\\n         → 调用 agentLoop(prompt, uiCallbacks)\\\\n              → agent-loop.js\\\\n              → 从 session.js 加载 history\\\\n              → 构建 system = SYSTEM_BASE + buildSessionContext()\\\\n              → 循环调用 LLM，执行工具\\\\n              → 通过 uiCallbacks 回调通知 panel.js 渲染\\\\n              → 持久化 history 到 session.js (IndexedDB)\\\\n         → <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me think about the design for this feature.

The user wants:
1. Click on any historical message to "jump back" to that conversation point
2. Styles should be restored to what they were at that point
3. Agent context should also be adjusted

Let me think about the approaches:

### Approach 1: CSS Snapshot per Turn
Store the cumulative merged CSS after each user turn (or each `apply_styles` call). When jumping back, load that snapshot.

**Pros**: Simple to implement, fast to restore, no recomputation needed
**Cons**: Storage cost (each snapshot is the full CSS at that point), but since CSS is typically < 50KB and we're already storing it, this is manageable


### Approach 2: CSS Diff per Turn
Store only the delta (what was added/changed) for each turn. When jumping back, reconstruct by replaying diffs from the beginning up to that point.

**Pros**: Lower storage
**Cons**: More complex, reconstruction needed, error-prone

### Approach 3: Use cssStack as the source of truth
The `cssStack` already tracks individual additions. We could associate each stack entry with a turn index. But `mergeCSS` in storage layer doesn't preserve this granularity.

### My Recommendation: Snapshot Approach

The snapshot approach is clearly the best because CSS per session is already relatively small, making storage overhead negligible compared to the simplicity and reliability of just restoring a full snapshot at each point in the conversation.

#### Data Structure Changes

Currently, messages are stored as a flat array in IndexedDB. I need to associate style snapshots with specific points in the conversation. The history stores messages in Anthropic format, so adding fields directly to messages could be fragile. Instead, I should store snapshots separately in their own array, indexed by position in the history.

Looking at how the conversation flows, when a user clicks on a message like "改成深色模式", they want to jump to the state after that message was fully processed. So I need to track which history index corresponds to when each style change was applied and capture the CSS state at that point. So the user wants to click on any historical message and jump back to that point in the conversation—with the styles reverting to how they were after that message was processed, and the agent context truncating accordingly. This is essentially a branching feature where clicking an earlier message removes everything after it.

The key insight is that I need to capture a CSS snapshot after each complete turn (user message plus all agent responses and tool calls). I'm thinking the cleanest approach is storing these snapshots in IndexedDB alongside the conversation history, either as a separate array or embedded in a wrapper structure...

Actually, using message indices is fragile because history compression shifts everything around. A better approach is assigning each user message a monotonically increasing turn number that stays stable even when old messages get summarized and compressed.

I can add a `_turn` field to user messages as metadata—the underscore prefix is a common pattern that won't interfere with the API since the conversion function strips extra fields before sending to OpenAI.

Now I need to figure out how to handle the UI interaction: when a user clicks on a message bubble, I need to identify which turn they clicked on and then truncate the conversation back to that point.

For storing CSS snapshots, I should keep them separate from the compressed history in IndexedDB. But first I need to clarify what "going back" actually means—is the user branching off from that point (truncating everything after), or just viewing the old state? The context adjustment comment suggests branching, so I'll assume the history gets truncated and the user continues from there.

For implementation, after each agent turn completes, I'll snapshot the merged CSS and store it alongside the messages. The tricky part is deciding how to key these snapshots—using message indices seems reasonable, though I need to think through how that maps to the actual turn structure.

A cleaner approach might be to tag each user message with a turn number and store snapshots keyed by that turn, keeping the messages array clean for the LLM API calls. I'm realizing the turn concept needs to account for how compression works—when early turns get summarized into a single message, those original turn numbers disappear from the history, but their CSS snapshots remain stored separately. If a user clicks on a compressed summary, there's no way to pinpoint which specific turn within that summary they meant to return to.

The cleanest approach is to only allow clicking on non-compressed user messages, and when compression happens, I can prune the CSS snapshots for any turns that no longer exist in the message array.

For the actual storage implementation, I could either bundle the snapshots with the history in a new data structure, or keep them separate using a dedicated IndexedDB key like `{domain}:{sessionId}:snapshots`. The second option avoids breaking the existing data format.

I'm reconsidering whether to store snapshots in chrome.storage.local alongside the session data, but with each snapshot potentially being 50KB and maybe 20 turns per session, that's 1MB per session which could exceed the ~10MB limit. IndexedDB is the better choice for this.

Let me trace through what the user actually experiences: they send a message, the agent applies CSS changes, and those changes accumulate across turns as the conversation progresses.

When a user clicks back to an earlier message like Turn 2, the history gets truncated there, and the CSS reverts to the merged state from that point. The content script needs to unload the current CSS and reload the snapshot CSS, which is essentially the same operation as switching between sessions.

Now I'm thinking through the UI changes needed in the panel to support this branching behavior. , user messages have no click handler. We need to:
1. Add a click handler (or a "go back to here" button) on user message bubbles
2. When clicked, show a confirmation dialog ("回到此处？之后的对话将被丢弃")
3. On confirm:
   a. Truncate history
   b. Restore CSS snapshot
   c. Re-render the chat
   d. Update storage

### Interaction with History Compression

When history is compressed, old turns are replaced by a summary. The snapshots for those turns should be cleaned up. But we should keep the "latest snapshot before compression" as the base, because if the user clicks on the summary message, they could go back to that point (with the CSS state at compression time). So when compression happens, we can store the CSS at compression point as snapshot[0] (the base) and discard all older snapshots.

### What about rollback?

Rollback is a within-turn operation while snapshots are per-turn, so these operate at different granularities and can coexist. Within a turn, `cssStack` handles fine-grained rollback of individual `apply_styles` calls. Across turns, snapshots let us jump back to any previous turn's final state.

### Plan Summary

I need to add CSS snapshot storage that saves the merged CSS after each complete agent turn, storing it in IndexedDB with a separate key. I'm settling on storing CSS snapshots in IndexedDB alongside the messages, keyed by turn number for easy lookup. For backward compatibility, I need to handle both the old array format and the new object format with messages and snapshots. Rather than tagging each message, I can compute turn boundaries on the fly by counting user text messages—a turn starts with user text and ends before the next user message.

When jumping back to a previous turn, I'll truncate the message array to that turn's boundary, restore the saved CSS snapshot, and clean up any snapshots from later turns. Now I need to figure out what happens with...

For turns that don't modify styles, I could either store duplicate CSS snapshots or only save when changes occur. Storing every snapshot is simpler and keeps the jump-back logic straightforward—the storage overhead is negligible since CSS is typically small and sessions have relatively few turns. I'll go with always storing snapshots for consistency.

Actually, that means storing the same CSS multiple times if most turns don't change styles. A better approach is to only snapshot when styles actually change, then when jumping back to a turn without its own snapshot, find the most recent one before it. This is more efficient and still fast to look up, though it adds a bit of complexity. Let me reconsider whether the simpler approach is worth it.

The simpler version: just snapshot whenever `apply_styles` is called with the merged CSS at that moment. But if `apply_styles` gets called multiple times in a single turn, I'd be storing intermediate states. I should only capture the final CSS state at the end of each turn.

So here's my plan: compute the turn number at the start of the loop, then at the end after all agent iterations, grab the current merged CSS and save it as a snapshot keyed to that turn number, storing it alongside the history in IndexedDB. For jumping back, I find the snapshot with the highest turn number that's less than or equal to the target turn.

Now I'm thinking through the jump-back flow: retrieve that CSS snapshot, truncate the messages to the end of the target turn, reload the CSS into storage, clean up any snapshots from later turns, and re-render the chat.

I also need to handle backward compatibility since existing sessions won't have this snapshot structure. The migration logic should detect whether the stored data is the old plain array format or the new format with messages and snapshots, then convert accordingly.

Handling migration...

For edge cases, I'm considering how compression affects snapshots—old turn numbers become stale, so I should prune snapshots beyond the compression boundary and keep only the latest one before it. Rollbacks within a turn still use the CSS stack as before, and snapshots are always captured at turn end. If the agent errors mid-turn, I still want to preserve whatever CSS state exists. Sessions with no style changes would just have an empty or minimal snapshots object, and the jump-back mechanism still functions correctly.

Now I'm thinking through the UI interaction for clicking historical input—the user mentioned "点击历史输入" but I need to clarify what that means. A hover button with a rewind icon on user messages is probably the best UX since it's discoverable without being intrusive. I should also account for the user's note about context adjustment: when jumping back, the history array passed to the agent needs to be trimmed accordingly, so the agent only sees messages up to that point. (1) jump to any historical point.

Snapshots are better than diffs because they're simpler to implement, faster to restore, and more resilient to errors, plus the storage overhead is minimal—CSS files are small enough that even twenty turns of history fits comfortably in IndexedDB. I need to update the IndexedDB schema to store both messages and turn-indexed CSS snapshots, handle backward compatibility when loading old sessions, and then modify the agent loop to capture and save the current CSS state after each turn completes.

On the UI side, I'll add a rollback button to historical messages that shows a confirmation dialog before jumping back, which involves truncating the message history to that turn boundary, restoring the CSS snapshot, updating the style keys, and pruning any snapshots from later turns. The compression logic also needs to clean up snapshots for compressed turns while preserving the snapshot at the compression boundary as the new baseline.</details></think>

CSS 并存入 snapshots：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\n// agentLoop() 尾部，saveHistory 之前\nconst currentCSS = (await chrome.storage.local.get(session.stylesKey))[session.stylesKey] || '';\nconst turnNumber = countUserTextMessages(history); T 的条目\n    S-&gt;&gt;S: 5. 写回 IndexedDB + 更新 stylesKey/activeStylesKey\n    S-&gt;&gt;C: loadSessionCSS(snapshotCSS)\n    C-&gt;&gt;C: cssStack = [snapshotCSS], 重新渲染\n    S--&gt;&gt;P: 返回截断后的 messages\n    P-&gt;&gt;P: renderHistoryMessages(truncatedMessages)\n    P-&gt;&gt;P: updateStylesSummary()\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n新增函数 &#96;rewindToTurn(domain, sessionId, targetTurn)&#96; 位于 [session.js](extension/sidepanel/session.js)：\n\n1. 从 IndexedDB 加载 &#96;{ messages, snapshots }&#96;\n2. 遍历 messages，找到第 &#96;targetTurn + 1&#96; 个用户文本消息的索引（如果存在），截断到该索引之前；如果不存在则保留全部（说明 targetTurn 是最后一轮）\n3. 从 snapshots 中取 &#96;snapshots[targetTurn]&#96;（如果该轮无快照，向前查找最近的 &#96;max(key &lt;= targetTurn)&#96;）\n4. 删除 snapshots 中 &#96;key &gt; targetTurn&#96; 的条目\n5. 更新 &#96;stylesKey&#96; 为快照 CSS，同步 &#96;activeStylesKey&#96;\n6. 写回 IndexedDB\n7. 通过 &#96;loadSessionCSS&#96; 将快照 CSS 注入页面\n8. 返回截断后的 messages 供 UI 重新渲染\n\n### UI 交互设计\n\n在 [panel.js](extension/sidepanel/panel.js) 的 &#96;renderUserMessage&#96; 和 &#96;renderHistoryMessages&#96; 中：\n\n- 为每个用户文本消息气泡添加 &#96;data-turn&#96; 属性，记录轮次号\n- 鼠标悬停时在气泡右上角显示一个\"回退\"图标按钮（时钟/回退箭头图标，CSS hover 显示）\n- **不在最后一轮消息上显示**（已经是最新状态）\n- 点击按钮弹出确认提示：\"回到这一轮？之后的对话和样式修改将被丢弃\"\n- 确认后调用 &#96;rewindToTurn&#96;，用返回的 messages 重新 &#96;renderHistoryMessages&#96;\n\n### 向后兼容与数据迁移\n\n在 [session.js](extension/sidepanel/session.js) 的 &#96;loadAndPrepareHistory&#96; 中处理两种格式：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\nasync function loadAndPrepareHistory(domain, sessionId) {\n  const data = await loadHistory(domain, sessionId);\n  if (Array.isArray(data)) {\n    // 旧格式：纯 messages 数组，无快照\n    return { messages: data, snapshots: {} };\n  }\n  return {\n    messages: data.messages || [],\n    snapshots: data.snapshots || {}\n  };\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n所有使用 &#96;loadAndPrepareHistory&#96; 对象。\n\n### 历史压缩兼容\n\n[agent-loop.js](extension/sidepanel/agent-loop.js) 的 &#96;checkAndCompressHistory&#96; 在压缩旧对话时：\n\n- 计算被压缩掉的最大轮次号 &#96;compressedMaxTurn&#96;\n- 保留 &#96;snapshots[compressedMaxTurn]&#96;（压缩边界处的完整 CSS 状态）作为新的基准快照\n- 删除所有 &#96;key &lt; compressedMaxTurn&#96; 的快照\n- 压缩摘要消息标记为非可回退（UI 上不显示回退按钮）\n\n### Content Script 侧适配\n\n[content.js](extension/content/content.js) 中的 &#96;cssStack&#96; 和 &#96;loadSessionCSS&#96; 无需结构性修改。回退时通过已有的 &#96;loadSessionCSS(snapshotCSS)&#96; 即可完成样式切换——它会清空 &#96;cssStack&#96; 并加载快照 CSS 作为唯一条目。\n\n回退后用户发新消息，&#96;agentLoop&#96; 正常运行，新的 &#96;apply_styles(save)&#96; 会在 &#96;cssStack&#96; 上 push，&#96;mergeCSS&#96; 会基于快照 CSS 继续合并。\n\n## 需要修改的文件清单\n\n- **[session.js](extension/sidepanel/session.js)**：修改 &#96;loadAndPrepareHistory&#96;
